issues.title: QuestionAnswerAdvisor找不到，已经deprecated
issues.body:
> > 更换了qwen2.5的模型后恢复正常使用。应该是不支持qwen3
> 
> ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/796b9180-0fa8-42ee-9183-b628a7338820)
> 
> ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1a982e34-de1b-4176-be3f-2186161bd26f)
> 
> ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/63d6a5a5-f4cb-4c65-829c-74216ae66993)
> 
> 我用的这个向量模型，但是对话大模型用的qwen3
> 
> 我的是bge-m3:latest， 1024v 

 _Originally posted by @jingbio in [#2978](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/2978#issuecomment-2856924897)_

comments.body: 对话模型我用的qwen-plus模型也不行，试了bge-m3:latest和qwen2.5都不行，向量模型用的text-embedding-v3
@hedyvhan I checked the original issue but still don't quite understand what's happening.Can you describe a bit more overall what the current issue is?A code description would be great!

> [@hedyvhan](https://github.com/hedyvhan) I checked the original issue but still don't quite understand what's happening.Can you describe a bit more overall what the current issue is?A code description would be great!

we met the same question that when using QuestionAnswerAdvisor but not found, as figure shows blow:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3e933d93-9516-4654-9ddb-677b7a1d9be4)

some says they use alibaba model qwen2.5 or bge-m3:latest but not works, and i use  model qwen-plus either。
code related as followed:
`

    public ChatClient pdfClient(OpenAiChatModel model, ChatMemory chatMemory, VectorStore vectorStore){
        String serviceSystem = new String("""
               
                """);


        var qaAvisor = (Advisor) QuestionAnswerAdvisor.builder(vectorStore)
                .searchRequest(SearchRequest.builder().similarityThreshold(0.8d).topK(6).build())
                .build();

        return ChatClient
                .builder(model)
                .defaultSystem(serviceSystem)
                .defaultAdvisors(
                        new SimpleLoggerAdvisor(), // 日志记录，debug级别
                        MessageChatMemoryAdvisor.builder(chatMemory).build(),  // 拦截时候，存储到内存
                        new QuestionAnswerAdvisor(vectorStore)
                    )
                .build();
    }`


and i read spring AI  document:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7180fa93-8ab1-4ee9-8c5f-7f1cedbf86b3)
but it  not  works for me.
 [spring AI  document](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/retrieval-augmented-generation.html#_questionansweradvisor)

@hedyvhan I tried to reproduce your problem, but in my demo, `QuestionAnswerAdvisor` can be introduced normally: to use it, the following dependencies need to be introduced: ``` org.springframework.ai spring-ai-advisors-vector-store ``` My Spring AI version is 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT

> i checked my code:
> 
> ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ca025c01-edee-47a5-9978-27e21a1f6038)
> 
> ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a6cc398b-494d-42b4-af9e-f11a9459b264)

I don't know where the problem lies 😭

> I don't know where the problem lies 😭

I think you should adjust the version of your `spring-ai-advisors-vector-store` dependency to `1.0.0`

> > I don't know where the problem lies 😭
> 
> I think you should adjust the version of your `spring-ai-advisors-vector-store` dependency to `1.0.0`

ok,  **change 1.0.0-M8 to 1.0.0**, that's really works, thx!  😄
If your issue has been addressed, feel free to close this. @hedyvhan
